title: TODO: short title
description: The Java service is crashing with OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space. The JVM is configured with a maximum heap of only 128m, which is insufficient for the application's working set. The heap ceiling must be raised to 512m and the service state set to stable.
hint_1: read /opt/winlab/advanced-scenarios/jvm.options to find the heap setting
hint_3: Change -Xmx128m to -Xmx512m so the JVM has enough heap to handle the workload
